{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":2443},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7207032176213754685","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"诙谐幽默，现实主义描写手法，去描写生活在古代的一群热血传奇，时而令人捧腹大笑，时而令人啼笑皆非，时而又令人泪流满面，人物刻画丰满有型，很不错的一本书！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1678018022,"group_id":"6998412051588582407","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2TwoanprH10q0/Piwzm36k=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"4645480017","user_name":"梨花雨987"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4645480017","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6998412051588582407","book_info":{"abstract":"国朝新立，百业待兴。
举荐的文官故作惊人姿态高谈阔论，已有键盘侠雏形。
开国的武将百般受辱唾面自干，夹着尾巴做人。
越王府中，三世子秦游捏着被退婚的书约，看着府中拖欠下人薪俸的账目，听着老管家的碎碎念，仰天长叹“这开局，完全就是地狱难度啊。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/cafa3c023a15af03fe16b0060407e637","author":"菲硕莫薯","author_id":"","book_id":"6998412051588582407","book_name":"世子凶猛","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c8d0c0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7018575829244477982","read_count":"21315","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3052775"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"1337","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,架空","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/081a7ef607ccecb65a2c626feb528540~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779303521&x-signature=maifGpm2U%2B%2FJeX0KgI4hggUsrzM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.05708248e+08"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读112小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":197532,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":403239,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":5681},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7138409791852135172","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_li },"text":"最近看的比较好看的一本小说了，幽默搞笑看了心情好，虽然有时候觉得主角比较中二，但瑕不掩瑜，故事里的每个人都很有个性我都超喜欢，不过我感觉秦文的情节很可惜，出场太靠后了，又有点重要，所以有匆忙的感觉，其实也可能是我太不舍书完结了吧，谢谢作者带来精彩的作品，再接再厉！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1685987903,"group_id":"6998412051588582407","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"种田文，重生文，我的最爱。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7ekVOLEW8v8t4gWQhtcP8Q=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e301bc6d30d3456c80b989ea59da352f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705168&x-signature=pRdInszqIxL61ioBXCq%2FXOzGjM8%3D","user_id":"103247110592","user_name":"铁头大熊"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"103247110592","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6998412051588582407","book_info":{"abstract":"国朝新立，百业待兴。

,"text":"写的很好，节奏很好。不像很多书一样到一定字数就“腻”了。每个人塑造的也很好。真的好久没见过这样能把人物写的如此鲜明的了。番茄也用了几个月了，看我书架也知道我看了好多书了，这是目前我看过的写的最耐看的一本了。讲真哪怕是号称番茄神书的那些，也没这本耐看。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1687359818,"group_id":"6998412051588582407","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4H4slsIclwQcTejobIoV6kYvyDa32L6AsToFhqnAtgS","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a50e16abfa19401080656049b81aaa44~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708491&x-signature=sSb5Q3CFHH0QUExyYmVz8gkHmOM%3D","user_id":"2392192214377183","user_name":"蛊真人牛掰"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2392192214377183","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6998412051588582407","book_info":{"abstract":"国朝新立，百业待兴。

ntent":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"而且那些差评那些喷子，很多人都没有看过超过五个小时，甚至有的人只有区区十几分钟，直接喷，不堪的话连我们这些看客都觉得辛辣过分，更别说作者了。我觉得，还是礼貌一点，素质有待提升。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1669743792,"group_id":"6998412051588582407","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"109515706664"}},"expand":{"book_id":"6998412051588582407","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.15034072e+08"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读60小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":215032,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7171492628390003492","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺不错的书，看的时候别带脑子别思考，看就行了。刚开始前两百章看了将近一周，觉得没什么意思的书，中间停了一段时间，重新拾起来看，一口气看完了，虽然很多人对这本书贬褒不一，但是作者在书里也有解释，想看的人看就是了，觉得不错不妨夸赞两句，就当是对作者的鼓励。倘若是不喜欢，也没必要喷，不看就是了。谢谢作者的书，最起码是很轻松的文。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1669743652,"group_id":"6998412051588582407","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"喜欢看书，也想写出好的故事","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwMozmtX2+nBDMC3y/kQ6Lo=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8c72d9672e014fc9b3bbfc2af2ccdf93~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701995&x-signature=XiKd%2BYQyjg6ln5qQDQD2ccZ7idw%3D","user_id":"109515706664","user_name":"不忘江河"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"109515706664","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1662455306,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2
